org.docgene.help.gui.swing

Class SwingSwingEngineManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.help.gui.swing.AbstractSwingEngineManager
      • org.docgene.help.gui.swing.SwingSwingEngineManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EngineManager

    public class SwingSwingEngineManager
extends AbstractSwingEngineManager
    The Swing engine manager for the Swing help viewer.

      • Fields inherited from class org.docgene.help.gui.swing.AbstractSwingEngineManager

      Go to an anchor in a specific URL.

      We show embedded HTML content in a JFXPanel because Swing may not render correctly HTML content by default (for example javadoc).

        public boolean goTo(Article article,
                    java.lang.String anchor,
                    boolean allowReload)
        Description copied from interface: EngineManager
        Go to an anchor in a specific article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        anchor - the anchor
        allowReload - true if reloading pages is allowed
        Returns:
        true if the article and the anchor do exist

      • goTo

        public boolean goTo(java.net.URL url,
                    java.lang.String anchor)
        Go to an anchor in a specific URL.
        Parameters:
        url - the URL
        anchor - the anchor
        Returns:
        true if reloading pages is allowed

      • loadHTML

        public boolean loadHTML(java.net.URL url)
        We show embedded HTML content in a JFXPanel because Swing may not render correctly HTML content by default (for example javadoc).
        Parameters:
        url - the URL
        Returns:
        if the html content could be loaded

      • setPage

        public boolean setPage(java.net.URL url)
        Description copied from interface: EngineManager
        Set the current page.
        Parameters:
        url - the current page URL
        Returns:
        true if the URL do exist

      • scroll

        public java.lang.String scroll(java.lang.String desc,
                               boolean isNewPage)
        Description copied from interface: EngineManager
        Scroll to a reference on a page.
        Parameters:
        desc - the reference
        isNewPage - if the reference is in a new page
        Returns:
        the reference f it was possible to scroll, null if not
